name: Google Search
description: Local Google search through the real browser; returns compact structured results.

defaultLang.description: Default Google interface language (hl), e.g. "en" or "zh-CN". Defaults to "en".

region.description: Default Google region (gl), e.g. "us" or "cn". Optional.

browserProfile.description: OpenClaw browser profile to use. Defaults to the configured default profile.

maxResultsCap.description: Hard cap on results returned to the model (default 10).
